name: Really Delicious Lima Beans
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat the bacon over moderate heat until it is partially rendered.
2. Add olive oil when the bacon fat has rendered sufficiently.
3. Add onions and cook, covered, for 15 minutes or until very tender.
4. Stir in garlic, tomatoes, tomato puree, and red chili; simmer uncovered for 5 minutes.
5. Incorporate lima beans and return to a simmer. Cook, covered, for another 15 minutes or until the beans are fully cooked.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve alongside grilled Italian sausages or breakfast sausages.
Yield: 4 servings
